basics.name: Karan Verma
basics.title: Full Stack Java Developer | Software Engineer
basics.summary: Java Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience designing and developing scalable backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs and Microservices architecture. Built real-world applications including geolocation-based ride matching systems and database-driven web platforms with React-based frontend interfaces. Strong foundation in Data Structures, Object-Oriented Programming and backend system design.

bullets: Developed backend services using Java and Spring Boot with MySQL integration.
Implemented REST APIs and CRUD operations for web applications.
Tested APIs using Postman and maintained source code using Git.

projects.title: QuickRide – Cab Booking System
bullets: Designed REST APIs for ride booking, driver discovery and ride lifecycle management.
Implemented geolocation-based driver matching using the Haversine distance formula.
Prevented concurrent ride acceptance using conditional database updates to handle race conditions.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using React.js for ride booking and real-time ride tracking.

projects.title: E-commerce Web Application
bullets: Built MVC web application using HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
Implemented DAO design pattern for database interaction.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering

achievements: Built QuickRide full stack application implementing geolocation-based driver discovery and ride matching logic.
Developed multiple full stack applications using Spring Boot and MVC architecture.
extra: I am passionate about working in collaborative environments and take pride in delivering high-quality software solutions that align with both technical requirements and business objectives.
I am actively seeking opportunities to contribute as a Full Stack Developer and grow in a challenging, innovation-driven role.
